column19: Scheme Twists in the Villain Deck

column23: First attempt was not good with too many escapes and too many turns, but the second one was amazing! Left side focused on BW/Ms Marvel/TAH bystander/draw combo and Right side used Wiccan & Siryn for charging up TF 246 more easily. After 5 twists the only classes in the "Evolution" pile were covert and tech and only made the Evolved Ultrons pushovers worth 6 VP. I have managed to shater all villains twice in one turn using Siryn's Uncommon, but my last turn is my favorite one - with two BW's uncommons and TAH's Rare and bunch of cards that draw cards I have made 44 attack and 6 recruit in total which was just enough to deliver the final blow on Exodus and clear the full city! Great setup worth for the Finals!
Hopefully this is good enough to make it to the finals. My first game had more points per turn but higher turn count and an escape.
